DISCOVERY, PLAINTIFF AMY MARQUES MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY REQUEST IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE MORE SPECIFIC INFORMATION, INCLUDING NAMES, ADDRESSES AND PHONE NUMBERS, AND FACTUAL INFORMATION THAT IS RESPONSIVE TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED. DEFENSE COUNSEL MUST REMIT $1,727.50 TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF AMY MARQUES MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Shaun M. Murphy, Esq. of Slovak Baron & Empey LLP 760/322-2275 for pltf & moving party;

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY REQUEST IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE MORE SPECIFIC INFORMATION, INCLUDING NAMES, ADDRESSES AND PHONE NUMBERS, AND FACTUAL INFORMATION THAT IS RESPONSIVE TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED. DEFENSE COUNSEL MUST REMIT $1,727.50 TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
